summary: Frontend-only verification of redesigned AdminLegalSettings.js (Tailwind + design tokens). Login as admin@atlas.dev → /api/web-ui/admin/legal-settings rendered correctly. ALL critical acceptance criteria PASSED: (1) Horizontal padding pl=50px / pr=50px exactly, py=40px top + pb=80px bottom; (2) Header title 'Legal & social' renders dark (rgb 26,23,20) on light bg (rgb 250,248,244) and light (rgb 235,234,229) on dark bg (rgb 15,15,17) — NO white-on-white anywhere; (3) Save disabled at load, becomes enabled the moment a toggle/text changes, 'Unsaved changes' amber indicator appears; (4) All 6 social cards (telegram/tiktok/instagram/youtube/facebook/github) render with toggle+url+brand-dot+hint, custom peer-checkbox toggle truly flips state; (5) URL validation: typing 'invalid' into enabled URL shows red border (rgb 244,63,94 = rose-500) + inline error 'URL must start with http:// or https://'; error disappears after typing valid URL; (6) Three tabs (terms/privacy/cookies) all present and switchable, body+title fields editable, word counter updates ('4 words · 24 chars'); (7) Save button → PUT succeeds, 'Saved' toast appears, 'All changes saved' muted indicator shown, Save disabled again; (8) Reload button present; (9) Cookie stats section renders with legal-stat-{all,essential,rejected}; (10) Dark theme (atlas_theme=dark) properly inverts all colors via design tokens, both themes fully readable; (11) RBAC works — client@atlas.dev cannot reach /admin/legal-settings (redirected to /client/dashboard). Note: localStorage key for theme is 'atlas_theme' (not 'theme' as test request implied) but this is a global ThemeContext concern, not an AdminLegalSettings issue.
critical_code_review_comments: AdminLegalSettings.js (~437 LOC) is borderline of the 700-LOC threshold — still acceptable but could be split into SocialCard / LegalDocumentEditor / CookieStats sub-components if it grows further.

Note: review_request mentioned localStorage key 'theme' for theme switching, but actual key is 'atlas_theme' (defined in /app/web/src/theme/tokens.js THEME_STORAGE_KEY). Both light & dark applied correctly through the global ThemeContext.
seed_data_creation: None — used existing legal-settings document. After save the youtube social was toggled & cleared, facebook enabled with https://facebook.com/atlas_test, privacy body briefly overwritten with 'Hello world test counter' to verify word counter. PUT call succeeded (Saved toast confirmed).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Web app served under /api/web-ui/ via FastAPI StaticFiles. Backend at https://react-native-build-23.preview.emergentagent.com/api. Admin login: admin@atlas.dev/admin123 → cookie session_token. Theme storage key is 'atlas_theme' ('light'|'dark'). Page path: /api/web-ui/admin/legal-settings. All testIDs verified: admin-legal-settings, legal-save, legal-reload, legal-social-{key}-toggle/url, legal-doc-tab-{kind}, legal-doc-{kind}-title/body, legal-stat-{all,essential,rejected}.
